title: Paint Calculator Room - How Much Paint Do You Need
description: Free paint calculator for rooms. Calculate how many gallons of paint you need based on room dimensions. Accounts for doors, windows, and coats.
keywords: paint calculator room, how much paint do I need, paint coverage calculator, room paint estimator, wall paint calculator
intro: Calculate how much paint you need for a room. Enter room dimensions and the calculator accounts for doors and windows.

faq.q: How much does a gallon of paint cover?
faq.a: One gallon of paint typically covers 350-400 square feet with one coat on smooth surfaces.

faq.q: How many coats of paint do I need?
faq.a: Most jobs need 2 coats. Use 1 coat for touch-ups or same-color repaints. Use 3 coats when covering dark colors with light.

faq.q: Should I subtract doors and windows?
faq.a: Yes. A standard door is about 20 sq ft and a window about 15 sq ft. Subtracting these gives a more accurate estimate.
